News Bob Blackman on Pro-Palestine Hate Marches Thursday, 18 December, 2025 We all mourn the victims of the Bondi Beach terror attack. Hate marches calling for a global intifada have led to this attack on Jewish people The Met have said these chants will now be an arrestable offence. I welcome this, but ask what will happen elsewhere across the country Follow Bob online: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bobblackmanofficial Instagram: https://www.instagram.com ... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Northen Ireland 18th December 2025 Bob raised his concerns about the Govt's plans to replace the Legacy Act. Our veterans should not be dragged through the courts. I called on the Govt to raise... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Animal Testing 18th December 2025 Bob called on the Govt to phase out animal testing in scientific laboratories and replace these cruel practices by effective alternatives wherever possible... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Nigeria 18th December 2025 We have all seen the shocking scenes in Nigeria. The UK has invested heavily in girls’ education there, yet they face intimidation and coercion from Islamist... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Chagos Islands 18th December 2025 A UN committee warned the Govt not to ratify the Chagos Islands treaty, citing “longstanding violations” of Chagossian rights. I asked if the Govt will listen... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on the Court Backlog 27th November 2025 At Harrow Crown Court, I saw first-hand that trials are being delayed due to a shortage of defence lawyers. The Govt’s response? Scrapping jury trials. We need... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Ajex Remembrance Parade 18th November 2025 I wear the Poppy and Marigold to honour all who made the ultimate sacrifice across the UK and Commonwealth. Next Sunday, the AJEX parade honours Jewish... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on Protecting Young People Online 18th November 2025 Chatbots have been linked to cases of self-harm and even suicide among young people. I urged the Minister to ensure these dangerous chatbots are taken down and... Speeches in Parliament Bob Blackman on the National Grid 18th November 2025 West London is being held back. Data centres, and much-needed housing can’t move forward because the National Grid can’t supply enough power. We can’t wait...
